parts.text: I live in Austin, TX and have Bermuda grass, about 2,000 sq ft. It rained an inch yesterday. Do I need to water today?
When should I water my lawn?
My St. Augustine lawn in Florida has yellowing patches in the sunniest spots, feels spongy, and is spreading. It's July. What's wrong and how do I treat it?
I have fescue grass in Denver, about 1,500 sq ft. When should I water it AND when should I fertilize it this fall?
Remind me to fertilize my Bermuda lawn in August. It's about 1,500 square feet.
Help me set up calendar reminders for when lawn requires services such as fertilizer.
I have a Kentucky Bluegrass lawn in Denver, about 3,000 sq ft. It's September. Can you give me a full treatment plan for what I should do this season?
